narrative:
Cols 60-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,343 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.5 percentage points.
